title: Mountain Hiking Adventure
description: A three-day ridge hike through the Himalayan foothills with warm homestays, panoramic viewpoints, and guided safety briefings. Expect steady climbs, cool mornings, and a celebratory summit sunrise.

itinerary.title: Trailhead Briefing
itinerary.description: Gear check, safety instructions, and a gentle warm-up walk to acclimate before the first climb.

itinerary.title: Summit Ridge Push
itinerary.description: Early start to reach the ridge for sunrise, with breaks at viewpoints and hot tea at a local lodge.

itinerary.title: Descent & Farewell
itinerary.description: Return via forest trail, group photos, and a relaxed lunch back in town.

title: Beach Party Weekend
description: A lively coastal weekend with a sunset bonfire, beach games, and a relaxed brunch by the sea. Designed for friends who want music, waves, and a quick recharge.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Beach Setup
itinerary.description: Check-in, room allocation, and a casual beach walk to pick activity zones.

itinerary.title: Sunset Bonfire
itinerary.description: Live acoustic set, BBQ dinner, and fireside hangout on the shore.

itinerary.title: Brunch & Farewell Swim
itinerary.description: Seaside brunch, group photos, and a final swim before checkout.

title: Historical City Tour
description: A guided walk through Old Dhaka’s iconic alleys, heritage sites, and bustling bazaars. Includes museum stops, artisan workshops, and a curated lunch of local favorites.

itinerary.title: Heritage Kickoff
itinerary.description: Meet at a central landmark, tour Lalbagh Fort, and learn the Mughal-era timeline.

itinerary.title: Old Dhaka Food Trail
itinerary.description: Curated lunch with biryani and traditional sweets at renowned local spots.

itinerary.title: Artisan Alley Walk
itinerary.description: Visit small craft shops and riverfront views before closing remarks.

title: Wildlife Safari
description: Explore the Sundarbans by boat and foot with expert guides. Expect mangrove creeks, birdwatching, and a chance to spot the Royal Bengal Tiger from safe observation points.

itinerary.title: Mangrove Departure
itinerary.description: Early boat departure with safety briefing, breakfast onboard, and wildlife orientation.

itinerary.title: Creek Exploration
itinerary.description: Quiet creek navigation for birdwatching, deer spotting, and photography.

itinerary.title: Forest Walk
itinerary.description: Guided trek through approved trails with ranger support and strict safety protocol.

itinerary.title: Return Journey
itinerary.description: Breakfast, debrief, and scenic cruise back to the dock.

title: Serene Tea Garden Retreat
description: A calm two-day escape in rolling tea gardens with tastings, nature walks, and quiet sunset viewpoints. Great for couples and small groups seeking slow travel.

itinerary.title: Tea Estate Welcome
itinerary.description: Check-in and guided walk through the estate, followed by a tasting session.

itinerary.title: Sunset Viewpoint
itinerary.description: Short drive to a lookout point with warm snacks and tea.

itinerary.title: Forest Walk
itinerary.description: Easy morning walk in Lawachara National Park and local breakfast.

title: Monsoon Rain Festival
description: A one-day celebration of the monsoon with live folk music, rain-friendly street food, and cultural performances under covered pavilions.

itinerary.title: Opening Ceremony
itinerary.description: Traditional drum welcome and introduction to the day’s performances.

itinerary.title: Food & Craft Market
itinerary.description: Regional cuisine, artisan stalls, and rain photo booths.

title: Winter Trekking
description: A crisp winter day trek through open fields and wooded trails with warm tea breaks and a gentle pace. Great for beginners wanting a cold-season outing.

itinerary.title: Trail Start
itinerary.description: Warm-up stretches, route overview, and a steady walk through winter fog.

itinerary.title: Tea Stop
itinerary.description: Local tea break and photo session at the viewpoint.

title: Island Hopping Cruise
description: A three-day island cruise with beach stops, snorkeling, and seafood dinners. Includes guided excursions and plenty of downtime by the water.

itinerary.title: Ferry Departure
itinerary.description: Boarding and safety briefing with breakfast onboard.

itinerary.title: Chera Dwip Snorkeling
itinerary.description: Shallow reef exploration with guides and safety floats.

itinerary.title: Sunrise Walk & Return
itinerary.description: Early beach stroll, breakfast, and return ferry.

title: Cycling Expedition
description: A 50km countryside cycling route with rest stops, hydration support, and a picnic finish. Ideal for riders with basic endurance.

itinerary.title: Route Briefing
itinerary.description: Helmet checks, route map review, and group warm-up ride.

itinerary.title: Midway Rest Stop
itinerary.description: Snacks, hydration, and quick bike tune-ups before the final stretch.

title: Photography Workshop
description: A hands-on landscape photography workshop with golden hour sessions, composition coaching, and guided editing tips.

itinerary.title: Lighting & Composition
itinerary.description: Afternoon session on framing, exposure, and lens choices.

itinerary.title: Golden Hour Shoot
itinerary.description: Sunset capture at Kaptai Lake with mentor feedback.

itinerary.title: Editing Clinic
itinerary.description: Post-processing workflow, presets, and portfolio selection.

title: Cultural Exchange Fair
description: A vibrant day of global flavors, performances, and art showcases with community groups and student associations.

itinerary.title: Exhibition Opens
itinerary.description: International stalls open with music and cultural introductions.

itinerary.title: Main Stage Performances
itinerary.description: Dance and music showcases from invited groups.

title: Winter Camping Night
description: A cozy overnight camp in Bandarban with a guided hike, bonfire dinner, and stargazing. Perfect for friends who want a short mountain escape.

itinerary.title: Camp Setup
itinerary.description: Pitch tents, safety briefing, and a short acclimation walk.

itinerary.title: Bonfire Dinner
itinerary.description: Warm meal, local stories, and acoustic music by the fire.

itinerary.title: Stargazing Session
itinerary.description: Skywatch with guide and light refreshments.

title: River Cruise Dinner
description: An evening river cruise with candlelit seating, live music, and a curated dinner menu along the Shitalakshya.

itinerary.title: Boarding & Welcome
itinerary.description: Check-in, welcome drinks, and table assignments.

itinerary.title: Dinner Service
itinerary.description: Multi-course dinner with soft live music and river views.

title: Yoga and Wellness Camp
description: A three-day wellness retreat with sunrise yoga, mindful walks, and clean, nourishing meals in a quiet setting.

itinerary.title: Sunrise Yoga
itinerary.description: Breathwork, gentle flow, and intention setting for the retreat.

itinerary.title: Mindful Nature Walk
itinerary.description: Slow walk through fields with reflection prompts.

itinerary.title: Closing Circle
itinerary.description: Group sharing, tea ceremony, and departure guidance.

title: Street Food Crawl
description: An evening street-food tour highlighting regional favorites, dessert stalls, and the stories behind each dish.

itinerary.title: Market Meet-Up
itinerary.description: Welcome briefing, first bites, and a short walk through the main food lanes.

itinerary.title: Dessert Crawl
itinerary.description: Local sweets, tea stop, and group photo wrap-up.

title: New Year Celebration
description: Ring in the new year with a beachfront countdown, fireworks, and a late-night feast. Ideal for groups who want a festive coastal night.

itinerary.title: Beachfront Welcome
itinerary.description: Check-in, dinner service, and live DJ warm-up set.

itinerary.title: Countdown & Fireworks
itinerary.description: Midnight celebration with fireworks and group photos.

title: Archeological Exploration
description: A guided heritage trip to the Somapura Mahavihara with story-rich walkthroughs, museum time, and a relaxed local lunch.

itinerary.title: Site Briefing
itinerary.description: Overview of the site history and walking route.

itinerary.title: Museum Visit
itinerary.description: Artifacts, exhibits, and Q&A with the guide.

itinerary.title: Local Lunch
itinerary.description: Regional meal and wrap-up before departure.
